gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: موثق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (19/306)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: موثق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (19/306)
text: قُلْتُ لِأَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) الدَّرَاهِمُ بِالدَّرَاهِمِ وَ الرَّصَاصِ فَقَالَ الرَّصَاصُ بَاطِلٌ .

en.hubeali: Safwan, from Is’haq Bin Ammar who said,
‘I said to Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup>, ‘The Dirhams by the Dirhams and the lead?’ So he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘The lead is invalid’.
en.sarwar: 8. Safwan has narrated from Ishaq ibn ‘Ammar who has said the following: “This is concerning my question before abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, if exchange of dirham for dirham and lead was permissible. He (the Imam) said, ‘Lead is not valid . 555
